parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO enocart_security_logs 
(session_id, customer_id, risk_score, risk_level, anomalies, action_taken, created_at)
VALUES 
('{{ $json.sessionId }}', '{{ $json.customerId }}', {{ $json.riskScore }}, '{{ $json.riskLevel }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.anomalies).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.action }}', NOW())
RETURNING id
